name: io.github.gumlau/agentgeo-mcp
description: Fetch raw AI answers with citations from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, AI Overview, AI Mode, Copilot

environmentVariables.name: AGENTGEO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AgentGEO API key (ag_live_... for live data, ag_test_... for zero-credit demo mode). Create one at https://agentgeo.org under /app/keys.

environmentVariables.name: AGENTGEO_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: AgentGEO API base URL. Defaults to https://api.agentgeo.org; self-hosters point it at their own server.
